description_long: This excavator features a compact, robust body with a predominantly yellow and black color scheme, typical of construction vehicles. The machine is equipped with a large articulated arm and a standard digging bucket, designed for earthmoving and excavation tasks. The cab is enclosed and positioned slightly to the left side of the undercarriage, providing visibility and protection for the operator. The undercarriage is fitted with wide, durable rubber tracks for stability and maneuverability on various terrains. The surface of the excavator is hard and smooth, with visible bolts and molded details that suggest reinforced construction. No visible brand logo is present, and the overall design is functional and utilitarian, suitable for urban construction sites.
description: A compact yellow and black excavator with a large articulated arm, standard digging bucket, and rubber tracks, featuring a left-positioned operator cab and a hard, smooth exterior.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide digging bucket and the articulated arm extending forward, with the cab and tracks visible behind.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the full length of the articulated arm, the bucket, and the left-positioned cab above the rubber tracks.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the cab, the engine compartment, and the width of the tracks.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the articulated arm and bucket from the opposite side, with the cab and track details visible.
